params.name: Global Design Award
params.description:
On Feb 17, 2022 AD, the 10th Global Design Award was held in Milan,Italy.
The Global Design Award is a famous award that focuses on excellent interior design works and projects. It aims to praise innovative designs that have a positive impact on the society and environment, covering various space designs. It provides a platform for interior designers and architects to show unique ideas and promote industry communication, creating more business opportunities for excellent designers.
